'''Phaseera''' was a [[Factory/Legends|manufacturing]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was the location of a [[Battle of Phaseera|battle]] near the end of the [[New Sith Wars]]. It had been occupied by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] before the conflict, but after the Republic defeat, it became [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] occupied. Its terrain included [[Jungle/Legends|jungles]], valleys, and plateaus. It [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] a [[Color/Legends|yellow]] [[Star/Legends|sun]], and [[cydera tree]]s grew on it.

{{Planet-stub}}
